title: SurvivalTweaks
description:
Add useful survival features and give overlooked items a new purpose.
Bring more variety to your world without changing the vanilla feel.
body:
[![License: GPL v3](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-GPLv3-orange.svg)](https://github.com/Norbit4/SurvivalTweaks/blob/master/LICENSE) [![Codacy Badge](https://app.codacy.com/project/badge/Grade/e572b411685a4df68e117d3544cba995)](https://app.codacy.com/gh/Norbit4/SurvivalTweaks/dashboard?utm_source=gh&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=&utm_campaign=Badge_grade)
Used Languages and Tools:

SurvivalTweaks is a lightweight plugin designed to **add meaningful mechanics to items that are usually forgotten or underused in Minecraft**. Every mechanic included in the plugin **can be individually enabled or disabled** in the configuration file, allowing you to tailor the experience exactly the way you want. This plugin introduces **quality-of-life improvements**, **new item interactions**, **balance tweaks**, and **fun utility mechanics**, all while staying simple, optimized, and compatible with **Paper 1.21.6+**.

🧭 Example mechanics

Size mechanic

After eating glow berries you become small. To return to your normal size eat a golden carrot.

Fireball mechanic

Fireball like ghost attack when player right click with fire charge.
